name: Rune Knight
description: Rune Knights harness giant runes and size-shifting martial power.

3.name: Bonus Proficiencies
3.description: You gain smith's tools proficiency and learn to speak, read, and write Giant.

3.name: Rune Carver
3.description: You inscribe runes onto gear and can invoke each rune's effect.

3.name: Giant's Might
3.description: As a bonus action, grow Large and gain advantage on Strength checks/saves and extra weapon damage once per turn.

7.name: Runic Shield
7.description: When a creature you can see hits with an attack roll, force a reroll with your reaction.

10.name: Great Stature
10.description: Your height increases and your Giant's Might damage improves.

15.name: Master of Runes
15.description: You can invoke each rune twice between rests.

18.name: Runic Juggernaut
18.description: Your Giant's Might can make you Huge and grants additional combat benefits.
